title: Uknown webhook to Zappier appearing in intergrations list on board

posts.author: Wes1 (Wes)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve noticed webhook automations appearing on the integrations lists of several boards.

I have not created these.

However, these boards do have Zaps listening for triggers, but I’ve not previously noticed seperate webhooks appearing in the integrations list. Therefore, I’m unsure if the appearance of these webhooks is expected behaviour or not.

Any insight would be helpful
